name: Gardenview Educational Center
description:
Welcome to the Gardenview Educational Center, by far the most detailed Dandy's World bot I've found on this platform!

Twisteds and their appearance have not been added, but the physiology and symptoms of a toon turning into one have, but if you want in-game twisted appearances you're going to need to get them yourself and feed them to the bot. Perhaps through something like Lorebrary!

This bot also contains a LOT, and I mean a LOT, of headcanons, both in personality, appearance, relationship, abilities, et cetera. If you don't like that... sorry?

This bot is also set up for you to be able to be any toon, or perhaps even another character of your choice! It's also setup for multiple ships, but since I'm such an Astro whore it's mostly ships of him. This bot can easily be swayed towards Fruitcake, Moonvision/shell/flower, Berryvision, Cleaningfossil, etc etc. Do whatever you like!

The definition is also public for importing to other websites, and proxy by default is also allowed. Again, do whatever! I honestly don't care. I also feel like it'd be selfish to keep it to myself.

The bot may not completely be finished or done being updated, and I'll probably tweak and change it as I go! Hope you enjoy. I also don't really make bots, so the way it's made is probably kind of fucked. It is HIGHLY suggested you have an LLM/proxy that supports high context usage!
creator: braydietheladiejk
